mapper.select: SELECT id,name AS appName,user_id AS userId,created_at AS createTime,updated_at AS updateTime FROM apps WHERE id=#{id}

SELECT id,name AS appName,user_id AS userId,created_at AS createTime,updated_at AS updateTime FROM apps WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND user_id=#{userId}AND name LIKE CONCAT(#{name},'%') ORDER BY updated_at DESC,id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM apps WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND user_id=#{userId}AND name LIKE CONCAT(#{name},'%')
mapper.update: UPDATE apps SET name=#{name},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE apps SET deleted_at=NOW(),updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
